panels.title: JMeter Exporter Reachable
panels.description: 1 while a JMeter thread-level run is active and its Prometheus exporter is up; 0 between levels — expected, since each staircase level is a fresh JMeter process.

panels.title: Response Latency (adjust to your plugin's metric name)
panels.description: Starter query against jmeter-prometheus-plugin's latency metric. Check http://localhost:9270/metrics (or the app container's port) during a run and adjust the metric name/labels to match your installed plugin version.

panels.title: Error Responses (adjust to your plugin's metric name)
panels.description: Starter query against jmeter-prometheus-plugin's response-count metric; adjust to match your installed plugin version.
